(Nasdaq: BLDE) revealed that CEO Rob Wiesenthal and CFO Will Heyburn will speak at the Jefferies eVTOL / AAM Summit on May 28, 2025, at 10:40am ET. news.summary: RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ) convened its Annual General Meeting on May 22, 2025, in Stockholm, Sweden. During the meeting, key decisions were made. Among these was the re-election of board members Carl Filip Bergendal, Johan Löf, Günther Mårder, and Britta Wallgren. This resolution was one of several adopted during the meeting. The event held significance for the company as it sets the tone for its operations in the upcoming fiscal year.
news.headline: RaySearch Laboratories AB held AGM on May 22, 2025 in Stockholm, Sweden. Carl Filip Bergendal, Johan Löf, Günther Mårder, Britta Wallgren were re-elected.

news.summary: PotlatchDeltic Corporation (Nasdaq: PCH) shared that their CEO, Eric J. Cremers, and CFO, Wayne Wasechek, will be presenting a company overview at the REITweek Conference in New York on June 4, 2025, at around 8:00 am Eastern Time. The live audio webcast of the presentation will be accessible through the Investors page on their official website at www.potlatchdeltic.com. This event provides an opportunity for investors to gain insights into the company's operations and future plans.
news.headline: PotlatchDeltic executives to present at REITweek in NY on June 4, 2025; overview for investors.

news.summary: Chicago-based real estate firm Cushman & Wakefield recently appointed Kelly Evans to the role of Senior Managing Director in the Multi-Market Advisory Solutions team. Evans brings a wealth of experience to the role as she joins the company.
news.headline: Kelly Evans joins Cushman & Wakefield as Senior Managing Director of Multi-Market Advisory Solutions team in Chicago.

news.summary: Today, in St. Petersburg, Florida, Superior Group of Companies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGC) disclosed that its Chairman, President, and CEO, Michael Benstock, along with CFO Mike Koempel, will be present at the Barrington Research Spring Investment Conference on May 29, 2025. They will be conducting virtual investor meetings all through the day.
news.headline: Superior Group of Companies to attend Barrington Research Spring Investment Conference on May 29, 2025. CEO and CFO to host virtual investor meetings.

news.summary: In San Diego on May 22, 2025, Lofta, a prominent company specializing in at-home sleep apnea testing and treatment, announced a collaboration with Bloom Mental Health, a provider of psychiatric care for individuals of all ages. The partnership aims to improve patient accessibility to sleep apnea diagnostics. This collaboration between Lofta and Bloom Mental Health is set to offer important benefits to individuals struggling with sleep disorders.
news.headline: At-home sleep apnea company Lofta partners with Bloom Mental Health to improve access to diagnostics.

news.summary: During the annual meeting held on May 22, 2025, ECN Capital Corp. (TSX: ECN) announced that all eight nominees listed in the Circular dated April 22, 2025 were successfully elected as directors. The meeting saw a total representation of 210,980,127 Common Shares and 27,450,000 Series E Shares, accounting for around 77.19% of the total votes. Common Shares and Series E Shares were jointly voted as a single class for all matters. The results of the virtual meeting are as follows: all eight nominees were elected as directors.
news.headline: ECN Capital confirms election of 8 directors at annual meeting with 210,980,127 Common Shares and 27,450,000 Series E Shares.

news.summary: In Cupertino, California, there has been a notable shift in the use of AI applications as they transition from prototyping to large-scale production. Developers are now facing practical challenges such as latency, privacy, and cost effectiveness. This change has led to a rising trend in favor of specialized small language models (SLMs) over generic large language models (LLMs). The selection of the appropriate SLM for a specific task has become a complex and ever-changing issue. In response to this demand, Aizip has emerged with a solution.
news.headline: Aizip develops first arena for benchmarking small language models; helps in selecting right SLM for task.

news.summary: Critter Stop, a Dallas-Fort Worth company, is now providing pest control services in Frisco, Texas.
news.headline: Critter Stop's Frisco location now provides pest control services to homes and businesses in the area. Based in Dallas-Fort Worth.

news.summary: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the "Switzerland Construction Industry Databook Series - Market Size & Forecast by Value and Volume, Q1 2025 Update" in its offerings. The Swiss construction market is projected to experience substantial growth, aiming to achieve EUR 41.06 billion by 2025, reflecting a yearly rise of 3.3%. Between 2020 and 2024, the sector demonstrated a strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.1%, a trend expected to continue with a CAGR of 2.7% from 2025 to 2029, leading to further expansion.
news.headline: Switzerland's construction industry on track for growth, expected to reach EUR 41.06 billion by 2025 with 3.3% annual increase.

news.summary: In Irwindale, California on May 22, 2025, BIC America unveiled their latest product, the A1 Elite Portable Bluetooth Speaker. This groundbreaking speaker combines powerful sound quality, visually appealing design, and eco-friendly materials. The A1 Elite is set to revolutionize the portable audio industry with its innovative features.
news.headline: BIC America launches A1 Elite Portable Bluetooth Speaker; promises top-notch sound & eco-friendly features.

news.headline: AMA sets CPT codes for minimally invasive ESD procedure; Olympus Corp announces on May 22, 2025.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Tap Native, a prominent digital advertising platform in the healthcare industry, introduced its latest feature, Bid by NPI. This precision targeting capability allows pharmaceutical advertisers to set personalized cost-per-click (CPC) bids. This innovation aims to enhance tailored advertising strategies and optimize campaign performance for better audience engagement.
news.headline: Tap Native introduces Bid by NPI, allowing pharmaceutical advertisers to customize CPC bids to target HCPs individually.

news.summary: Solana's (SOL) current price is fluctuating between $160 and $184, with resistance seen at $180. The bullish trend indicates a potential rally to $260, supported by the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 64.30. A breakout above $180 could push SOL towards targets of $200 and $220. However, the low buying volumes raise concerns, suggesting caution in the event of a breakout stall. Failure to breach $180 could see SOL drop to $140-150, invalidating the bullish pattern. Analysts predict a potential peak at $260 based on fractal patterns and hidden bullish divergence, with a long opportunity awaiting confirmation above $180. Investors are advised to conduct thorough research and exercise caution due to the inherent risks in trading.
news.headline: Solana price may rally to $260; caution advised due to low buy volumes. Bull flag pattern signals potential breakout above $180 for further gains. Watch for support at $140-150 to hold. Analysis suggests a bullish breakout can lead SOL to $450. Market speculators predict capital rotation to boost altcoins.

news.summary: OpenAI, in collaboration with designer Jony Ive, is set to release AI "companion" devices for mass consumption, aiming to ship 100 million units upon launch. The company, known for its ChatGPT large language model, had nearly 800 million weekly users in May, leading to a valuation increase from $157 billion in October 2024 to $300 billion in March 2025. In addition to these devices, OpenAI plans to venture into social media, potentially competing with platforms like Elon Musk's X and Mark Zuckerberg's Meta. The new platform could integrate ChatGPT's image generation capabilities with a social media feed akin to X's. AI and social media integration is also seen in the blockchain industry, with startups using AI agents and LLM tools for decentralized social media networks. OpenAI's ambitious projects aim to revolutionize the tech landscape.
news.headline: OpenAI plans to release 100M AI companion devices for mass use after securing billions in investments, with ChatGPT having 800M weekly users.

news.summary: Tenant Inc., based in Newport Beach, California, revealed on May 22, 2025, that its Hummingbird property management software (PMS) is now being used by more than 1,000 self-storage facilities. This development showcases the swift growth and adoption of the technology within the industry.
news.headline: Tenant Inc.'s Hummingbird PMS now serves over 1,000 self-storage facilities, boosting automation and tenant experiences.

news.summary: Dublin - A report on opportunities in the United Arab Emirates packaging industry, now available at ResearchAndMarkets.com, indicates promising growth ahead. The industry is expected to see a substantial increase in packaging volumes, rising from 13.3 billion units in 2024 to 14.9 billion units by 2028. This growth reflects a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 2.9% during the period from 2024 to 2028. In 2024, rigid plastics took the lead as the primary packaging material in use.
news.headline: UAE packaging industry expects growth to 14.9 billion units by 2028 from 13.3 billion in 2024, with CAGR of 2.9%.

news.summary: Representative Maxine Waters has proposed the "Stop TRUMP in Crypto Act," which aims to prohibit the President and his close relatives from benefiting from cryptocurrency investments during his tenure. This legislation is meant to ensure that no financial gains are made through crypto ventures by the President and his immediate family members while in office.
news.headline: Hours before a crypto dinner with Trump, Dems propose bill preventing him and family from profiting off crypto while in office.

news.summary: A recent report on the Austria Application Security Market indicates a promising future ahead. The market is expected to experience significant growth, with an estimated 18.2% annual increase. By 2025, the market size is forecasted to reach USD 220.9 million. This projection highlights a positive trend in the industry. The report delves into various aspects such as spend analysis by industry, security type, deployment, and enterprise size. Over the past five years, the market has shown steady progress and is likely to continue on this upward trajectory.
news.headline: Austria's application security market expected to reach USD 443.8 million by 2029, with 18.2% annual growth by 2025.

news.summary: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones and other major indices experienced gains in the afternoon. Quantum computing companies saw a notable increase in their stock prices. Specifically, the Dow Jones and the S&P 500 showed strength, with Palantir and other quantum stocks making significant leaps. This live coverage highlights the positive performance in the market on Thursday.
news.headline: Stock market gains as Dow Jones rises, Quantum stocks surge on Thursday. Live updates on this Investor's Business Daily report.

news.summary: Cardano (ADA) is currently trading at $0.7887, showing a 4.13% increase in the last 24 hours, a 1.07% increase in the past week, and a notable 25.82% increase in the past month. The price surge coincides with allegations of the misuse of 318 million ADA tokens by Input Output Global (IOG) post the 2020 Shelley upgrade. Charles Hoskinson, the founder of Cardano, has called for a full audit of IOG to address these allegations. IOHK Media dismissed the claims as false and part of a coordinated effort to spread fear, uncertainty, and doubt. Hoskinson emphasized the commitment to transparency and accountability by launching a comprehensive audit.
news.headline: Cardano's price at $0.7887 surged amid $600M ADA misuse allegations, up by 4.13% in 24 hours, 1.07% in a week, and 25.82% in a month. Charles Hoskinson calls for audit after accusations of 318M ADA tokens misuse. IOHK negates allegations, launched audit for transparency.
